title: Interior Design Consultant (Junior/Senior)
description:
🌟 Looking for an Exciting Career Change? 🌟


Join Orange Interior as an Interior Design Consultant

Are you feeling stuck in your current interior design role? Tired of the fixed salary or minimal commissions? Ready for a career that fuels your passion for design and rewards your dedication?


At Orange Interior, we’re not just looking for designers; we’re seeking passionate, team-oriented individuals ready to thrive in a dynamic environment.


Why Orange Interior?

  • 💼 Competitive Compensation: Basic salary plus incentives for qualified candidates. Your income has no ceiling!
  • 🌟 Exclusive Clientele: Handle genuine, quality clients from our robust client base.
  • ✈️ Incentive Trips & Annual Performance Bonus: Enjoy company incentive trips and annual performance bonus.
  • 🤝 Team Collaboration: Work with a supportive team, including an in-house project manager and drafter.

Job Description:

  • 🏠 Client Management: Manage and follow up with assigned clients (residential/commercial).
  • 🎨 Design Development: Provide professional design development and budget consultation.
  • 🔧 Project Coordination: Collaborate closely with project coordinators for smooth project management.
  • 🖼️ Creative Design: Create design proposals, concept mood boards, and space planning.
  • 📅 Project Planning: Initiate and plan project timelines efficiently.

Perks We’re Offering:

  • 💰 Attractive Remuneration: Basic plus incentive scheme or Full commission scheme.
  • 📚 Comprehensive Training: 100% coaching and guidance provided.
  • 💵 Lucrative Income: Annual income of $60,000-$100,000 for achievers.
  • 🛠️ Backend Support: Strong backend support team to assist with projects and client management.
  • 📈 Career Advancement: Opportunities for career growth and advancement.
  • 🌐 Team Environment: Collaborative and supportive work environment.

Ideal Candidate:

  • 🌟 Experienced: More than 1 year of experience in art, creative, interior design, or related fields.
  • ❤️ Passionate: Deep passion for design and creativity.
  • 💻 Skilled: Proficient in Sketch Up, Illustrator, AutoCAD, and Photoshop.
  • 🌱 Open-minded & Driven: Ready to set and achieve goals with great work ethics.
  • 🏗️ Background: Ideal candidates have a background in Interior Design, Architecture, Art, Creative, or Landscape.

Join Us!

If you’re ready to take your career to the next level, express your interest by submitting your resume now. Be part of our team of driven and dedicated professionals.


Don’t miss out on this opportunity to enhance your career and be rewarded for your passion and hard work. Apply today and become a part of Orange Interior!

postedCompany.description:
At Orange Interior, we believe people are our greatest asset. We also fully recognise that each individual has different needs. To this end, we offer a competitive benefits programme that reflects and rewards performance and motivates an employee toward work excellence.

We are committed to invest in the continued career development of our employees. We offer a wide array of learning and development opportunities, which include amongst others, on-the-job training; special projects and work assignments; in-house training and development programmes.
postedCompany.name: ORANGE INTERIOR PTE. LTD.
